metadata.title: 2022 Mexican Fiesta – Garden City, KS | Bull Attorneys
metadata.description: Bull Attorneys celebrate Hispanic Heritage at the 2022 Mexican Fiesta in Garden City, Kansas. See event highlights and community support.

hero.title: 2022 Annual Mexican Fiesta in Garden City, Kansas

content.intro: This year the Bull Attorneys attend the 96th Annual Mexico Fiesta in Garden City KS to celebrate our support and price in Hispanic Heritage Month.

sections.content: This year the Bull Attorneys attend the 96th Annual Mexico Fiesta in Garden City KS to celebrate our support and price in Hispanic Heritage Month. Hispanic Heritage Month began in 1968 when President Lyndon B. Johnson signed it into law to celebrate the Hispanic culture that has helped develop not only Garden City and western Kansas but also has contributed to the entire United States. Garden City, Kansas, began celebrating the annual Mexican Fiesta as far back as 1926. This year of 2022 marks 96 years of Hispanics making not only Garden City but also the entire State of Kansas a better place to live.

This annual Mexican Fiesta event was partially sponsored by the Bull Attorneys who have devoted their law firm and unique abilities to help everyone, especially the Hispanic citizens of Kansas and Garden City. Tony Atterbury, President of Bull Attorneys said, "We love our Hispanic clients and want to help contribute to the annual festivals that celebrate the culture of the Hispanics also called Comunidad Una Cultura." Bull Attorneys celebrated alongside our clients and gave out stuffed bulls to children as well as many other useful products to help everyone have a great time.

Bull Attorneys celebrates the Cry for Freedom known as "El Grito" dating back to September 16, 1810. We urge all Kansans to do the same and have tremendous respect for the Hispanic heritage and culture. Some of our photographs from this year's celebration are here for all to enjoy. If you have not attended the Mexican Fiests, you need to add it your must-see list!

images.alt: 2022 Annual Mexican Fiesta in Garden City, Kansas Image

sections2.content: See our gallery of community photos below and learn more at Garden City Mexican Fiesta 2022

The Bull Attorneys work hard to participate and celebrate our fellow citizens in Western Kansas. In addition to the Mexican Fiesta, the Bull Attorneys, with participation of Abogados Los Toros give away hundreds of Turkeys and Hams during Thanksgiving to families in need during the Holiday season.

Learn more about Mexican Fiesta and our cultural and community events by visiting our websites and social media links as well as calling us at 1-800-WIN-BULL. Bull Attorneys Facebook Page and the LinkedIn Page.
The personal injury lawyers at Bull Attorneys maintain a physical location in Garden City, Kansas, in order to conveniently serve all of Western Kansas.
